# Resolved Markets

> Prediction market and exchange orderbook data API. Captures high-frequency snapshots from Polymarket (~20Hz) and Hyperliquid (1/sec) across crypto, equities, social, sports, economics, and weather categories.

## API

Base URL: `https://api.resolvedmarkets.com`

Auth: Pass your API key via the `X-API-Key` header. Alternatively, use x402 micropayments ($0.001/request in USDC) — no account needed.

```
X-API-Key: rm_your_key
```

### Public Endpoints (no auth)

- `GET /health` — Health check with pipeline readiness status
- `GET /v1/public-stats` — Snapshot count, active markets, latest crypto prices

### Market Endpoints (API key required)

- `GET /v1/categories` — List all market categories with active counts
- `GET /v1/markets/live` — Currently active markets (`?category=social&subcategory=Elon`)
- `GET /v1/markets/history/recent` — Recently resolved markets
- `GET /v1/markets/history` — Full historical markets with pagination
- `GET /v1/markets/by-slug/:slug` — Look up a market by slug
- `GET /v1/markets/by-slug/:slug/orderbook` — Live orderbook by slug
- `GET /v1/markets/:id/orderbook` — Live orderbook by conditionId
- `GET /v1/markets/:id/snapshots` — Paginated historical orderbook snapshots
- `GET /v1/markets/:id/summary` — Aggregated stats: spread, depth, price range

### Exchange Endpoints (API key required)

- `GET /v1/exchange/orderbook?exchange=hyperliquid_perp&symbol=BTC` — Live Hyperliquid perp orderbook
- `GET /v1/exchange/snapshots?exchange=hyperliquid_perp&symbol=ETH` — Historical exchange snapshots (1/sec sampled)

### Snapshot Endpoints (API key required)

- `GET /api/snapshot?timestamp=ISO8601&marketId=CONDITION_ID` — Historical snapshot at timestamp
- `GET /api/snapshot/latest` — Last 5 snapshots

### WebSocket (API key required)

Connect to `/ws/orderbook`, then authenticate via message:

```json
{ "type": "auth", "apiKey": "rm_your_key" }
{ "type": "subscribe", "crypto": "BTC" }
```

### Billing Endpoints

- `GET /v1/user/tier` — Current tier, credits, limits
- `GET /v1/payments/subscription` — Clerk Billing subscription status
- `GET /v1/payments/packs` — Available tiers and credit packs
- `POST /v1/payments/create-invoice` — Create crypto payment invoice

### API Key Management (Clerk auth required)

- `POST /v1/api-keys` — Generate a new API key
- `GET /v1/api-keys` — List your API keys
- `DELETE /v1/api-keys/:key` — Revoke an API key

## Categories

| Category | Examples |
|----------|----------|
| **Crypto** | BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP up/down prediction markets (5m, 15m, 1h, 1d) |
| **Equities** | S&P 500 (SPX) daily open — Up or Down |
| **Social** | Elon Musk weekly tweet count ranges (grouped, ~30 sub-markets) |
| **Sports** | NBA, NFL, EPL match outcomes |
| **Economics** | FOMC rate decisions, Non-Farm Payrolls |
| **Weather** | Daily temperatures (30 cities), hurricanes, Arctic conditions |
| **Exchange** | Hyperliquid perpetual orderbooks (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP) |

## Credit System

Each API request costs credits: 1 (simple queries), 5 (snapshots), 10 (time-series). Free-tier users are exempt. x402 users pay per request instead of using credits.

## MCP Server

**Tools:** `list_markets`, `get_orderbook`, `get_snapshot`, `query_snapshots`, `get_market_summary`, `get_system_stats`

**Resources:** `markets://live`, `prices://latest`

Free tier: read-only MCP access. Pro/Enterprise: full access.

## Tiers

| Feature | Free | Pro ($17/mo) | Enterprise ($249/mo) |
|---------|------|-------------|----------------------|
| Crypto markets | BTC only | All (BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP) | Everything |
| Hyperliquid | -- | Perp orderbooks | Perp orderbooks |
| Sports / Social / Equities | -- | All included | All + odds |
| Rate limit | 60/min | 500/min | 3000/min |
| History | 24 hours | Unlimited | Unlimited |
| WebSocket | -- | 1 connection | 10 connections |
| MCP access | Read-only | Full | Full |
| API keys | 1 | 5 | 20 |

Payment methods: Card (Clerk/Stripe), Crypto (NOWPayments), x402 USDC micropayments.

## Links

- Website: [resolvedmarkets.com](https://resolvedmarkets.com)
- Full API reference: [llms-full.txt](https://resolvedmarkets.com/llms-full.txt)
